title: Giant Natural Additions
description: This Mod adds a variety of massive natural structures to your world
body:
Giant Natural Additions:

**This mod adds many giant natural objects to your world, ranging from massive trees and giant mushrooms to unique structures like oversized cacti and tree stumps.**


![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b077412616702e609ce2f6015d8832b27c346045.jpeg)


**It is a combination of all my previous giant-themed mods, brought together into one complete package.**

This mod includes the following structures:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Giant Pine Tree https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/giant-pine-tree

Giant Nether Tree https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/giant-nether-tree

Giant Ice Spike https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/giant-ice-spike

Giant Jungle Tree https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/giant-jungle-tree

Giant Oak Tree https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/giant-oak-tree

Giant Cherry Blossom Bonsai Tree https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/giant-cherry-blossom-bonsai-tree

Giant Bamboo https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/giant-bamboo

Giant Dead Oak Tree https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/giant-dead-oak-tree

Giant Snowy Tree https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/giant-snowy-tree

Giant Red Mushroom https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/giant-red-mushroom

Giant Palm Tree https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/giant-palm-tree

Giant Cactus https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/giant-cactus

Giant Brown Mushroom https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/giant-brown-mushroom

Giant Yellow Tree https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/giant-yellow-tree

Giant Tree Stump https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/giant-tree-stump

Giant Swamp Tree https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/giant-swamp-tree

</details>



![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1048090222233565447da3c4d52646dd63628ca4.jpeg)

- The terrain around the structures is carefully designed to blend naturally with the surrounding biomes.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75c01849025542f902bc59a2b6ce207323c598e4.jpeg)

- These giant structures also make perfect spots to build your base!

![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ed0874af82733606659b7c9152732d9038150e6.jpeg)


Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks
